columns.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: Zehavi et al. 2005 Table 1 (arXiv:astro-ph/0408564), M_r < -21 threshold sample
triple_check: rp values match Table 1 column headers of Zehavi+2005
wp values match the M_r < -21 column of Table 1
wp_err values are the 1-sigma jackknife errors in the same table
units: both rp and wp in h^-1 Mpc (Zehavi+2005 uses h^-1 Mpc throughout)
check n_bins matches figure 7 of Zheng+2007
notes: WMAP3 cosmology from Table 2 of Zheng+2007. Published HOD params from Table 3, M_r < -21 row.
